svg.text: Website
You've already found it!
There you can download the weekly missions in case your child is absent or loses the originals.
Weekly Email Update
Every week, I will send out an email with a summary of what we learned that week,
announcements, student point status, and that week’s missions.
If you aren’t getting this email,
let me know so I can add you to the email list.
Contact
Feel free to contact me at any time via phone, text, or email.
There is also a contact form on my
website.
In Conclusion...
Our goal in Kidstuff is to partner with you, the parents, in training your child in the Word of God.
I
use an army theme in my class not only because it is fun for the kids, but also because it is a good
analogy to the Christian’s life.
Life is a battle between God’s truth and Satan’s lies.
We need to take
God’s side and submit ourselves to Him as our “Commander-in-Chief.”
Through our study this year,
my prayer is that your child (and all of us) will come to know and love Jesus more deeply, and that
what we learn will not stay stuck in our heads, but move to our hearts in praise and hands in
ministry.
If there is any way we can serve you, please don’t hesitate to contact me.
With great excitement and prayerful hope for the year to come,
Jonathan Mulkey
2nd Grade Teacher
North Hills Church
jhmulkey@gmail.com
(see next page for list of ranks and point requirements)
